3114480.name: Gnome Game
3114480.description:
Gnome Game sends you on the journey of a gnome who has been given a special quest: save the world!

Customize your gnome to your liking and go forth on an adventure to wreak total havoc in retail stores, restaurants, offices and more unique locations. Being a gnome is not all easy fun and play though, sometimes the knights will try to bring a stop to your antics. Use your agility, cunning and speed to outmaneuver the knights and achieve total mayhem.

This indie game is a 3rd person RPG experience with a short story about making the world a better place. Drawing on iconic viral gnomes, this game aims to provide a fun experience of living the gnome meme for yourself.
